query:
ALTER TABLE adjustment_requests 
MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pendente', 'mais_informacoes', 'aprovada', 'reprovada', 'aguardando_lider') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
ADD COLUMN dadosAntesAjuste TEXT AFTER justificativaAdmin,
ADD COLUMN dadosAposAjuste TEXT AFTER dadosAntesAjuste,
ADD COLUMN approvedByLeaderAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER evaluatedBy,
ADD COLUMN approvedByLeaderId INT NULL AFTER approvedByLeaderAt;
